images.title: Ensemencement des pétoncles noirs pour un suivi en Rade de Brest (Ifremer 00635-74699 - 30391).jpg
images.description: Seeding of black scallops for monitoring in Brest Bay: installation of collectors by diver, each device containing a hundred young scallops marked with calcein. A collector will be taken every month for two years. The data obtained will improve the state of knowledge on the ecology and dynamics of the species. This project is part of the MaSCoET program, supported by France Filière Pêche, the Brittany Region and Brest Métropole.

images.title: Pétoncle noir (Mimachlamys varia) (Ifremer 00664-77619 - 31145).jpg
images.description: The black scallop ( Mimachlamys varia ), collected here in the harbor of Brest, is a bivalve filter-feeding mollusc attached to a solid support, from the bottom of the tidal zone to 8 - 10 m depth. It is found from southern Norway to the northern Gulf of Guinea, as well as around the Mediterranean.
